approach: Fix step status icon to prefer specContext.step over currentStep, verify related doc child rendering and unregistered doc discovery in specExplorerProvider.ts

T001.did: Changed step status icon check to prefer specContext.step over currentStep with nullish coalescing fallback

T002.did: Verified related docs render as children; then fixed checklists to show under Specify by adding subDir config and removing hardcoded exclusion

T003.did: Verified getRelatedDocs discovery and filtering logic correctly discovers unregistered .md files and attaches to includeRelatedDocs step — no code change needed

T004.did: Added 3 tests: step field preference over currentStep, currentStep fallback when step absent, completedAt green icon precedence

decisions: T002/T003: Related docs and unregistered doc discovery already work correctly — no code changes needed, only T001 required a fix
Added subDir: 'checklists' to Specify step so checklist docs appear under Specification instead of Plan

specify.key_finding: specExplorerProvider uses specContext.currentStep for in-progress icon but ignores specContext.step (SDD field); related docs hierarchy relies on contextValue prefix matching in getChildren

plan.approach_summary: Fix step status icon to prefer specContext.step over currentStep, verify related doc child rendering and unregistered doc discovery in specExplorerProvider.ts
